sqlMap.select:
/*ReportWrite090.selectReport090List*/ SELECT T.DGRCOMPO_ID AS DGRCOMPO_ID , T.UP_DGRCOMPO_ID AS UP_DGRCOMPO_ID , T.DGR_LEVEL AS DGR_LEVEL , T.FIS_YEAR AS FIS_YEAR , T.BGT_DGR AS BGT_DGR , T.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AS TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , T.REPORT_CD AS REPORT_CD , T.REPORT_DETL_CD AS REPORT_DETL_CD , T.REPORT_MSTR AS REPORT_MSTR , T.INDI_ATTR , T.GOV_SUB , T.ADVNC_PROC , T.TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ AS TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , T.DEMAND_COMP_FORMULAR AS DEMAND_COMP_FORMULAR , CAST((T.DEMAND_DIFF_AMT/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS DEMAND_BGT_AMT , T.COMP_FORMULAR AS COMP_FORMULAR , CAST((T.DIFF_AMT/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS BGT_AMT , T.PRE_COMP_FORMULAR AS PRE_COMP_FORMULAR , CAST((T.PRE_BGT_AMT/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_BGT_AMT , T.PRE_FORMULAR AS PRE_FORMULAR , CAST((T.PRE_AMT/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_AMT , CAST(((T.DIFF_AMT - T.PRE_BGT_AMT)/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS DIFF_AMT , T.COMPO_LEVEL AS COMPO_LEVEL , T.REFLECT_FG AS REFLECT_FG , T.DEMAND_CONT AS DEMAND_CONT , T.EXAM_CONT AS EXAM_CONT , T.EXAM_CONT AS EXAM_CONT_VIEW , T.SRCH_VAL AS SRCH_VAL , T.SRCH_VAL AS SRCH_VAL_VIEW , T.FRSCES AS FRSCES , TRIM(CASE WHEN T.DGR_LEVEL = 0 THEN '합계' WHEN T.DGR_LEVEL = 1 THEN T.OFFICE_NM WHEN T.DGR_LEVEL = 2 THEN T.DEPT_NM WHEN T.DGR_LEVEL = 3 THEN T.DBIZ_NM WHEN T.DGR_LEVEL > 3 THEN LAVEL_SYMBOL || T.COMP_GROUND ELSE '' END) AS DGRCOMPO_NM , T.UP_DGRCOMPO_ID AS PARENT , CASE WHEN T.CHILD_CNT > 0 THEN 'false' ELSE 'true' END AS IS_LEAF , 'true' AS EXPANDED , 'true' AS LOADED , T.DGR_LEVEL AS "LEVEL" FROM (SELECT A.DGRCOMPO_ID AS DGRCOMPO_ID , A.UP_DGRCOMPO_ID AS UP_DGRCOMPO_ID , A.DGR_LEVEL AS DGR_LEVEL , A.FIS_YEAR AS FIS_YEAR , A.BGT_DGR AS BGT_DGR , A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AS TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , A.REPORT_CD AS REPORT_CD , A.REPORT_DETL_CD AS REPORT_DETL_CD , B.REPORT_MSTR , B.INDI_ATTR , B.GOV_SUB , B.ADVNC_PROC , A.OFFICE_CD AS OFFICE_CD , A.DEPT_CD AS DEPT_CD , A.DBIZ_CD AS DBIZ_CD , A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD AS TE_MNG_MOK_CD , A.TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ AS TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , A.DEMAND_COMP_FORMULAR AS DEMAND_COMP_FORMULAR , A.DEMAND_DIFF_AMT AS DEMAND_DIFF_AMT , A.COMPO_LEVEL AS COMPO_LEVEL , A.COMP_GROUND AS COMP_GROUND , A.COMP_FORMULAR AS COMP_FORMULAR , A.DIFF_AMT AS DIFF_AMT , A.SORT_SEQ AS SORT_SEQ , A.PRE_COMP_FORMULAR AS PRE_COMP_FORMULAR , A.PRE_BGT_AMT AS PRE_BGT_AMT , A.PRE_FORMULAR AS PRE_FORMULAR , A.PRE_AMT AS PRE_AMT , A.REFLECT_FG AS REFLECT_FG , A.DEMAND_CONT AS DEMAND_CONT , A.EXAM_CONT AS EXAM_CONT , A.SRCH_VAL AS SRCH_VAL , NVL((SELECT Z.OFFICE_RANK FROM TB_DGRDEPT Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.OFFICE_CD = A.OFFICE_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS OFFICE_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.OFFICE_NM FROM TB_DGRDEPT Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.OFFICE_CD = A.OFFICE_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), '') AS OFFICE_NM , NVL((SELECT Z.DEPT_RANK FROM TB_DGRDEPT Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DEPT_CD = A.DEPT_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS DEPT_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.DEPT_NM FROM TB_DGRDEPT Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DEPT_CD = A.DEPT_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), '') AS DEPT_NM , NVL((SELECT Z.PBIZ_RANK FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS PBIZ_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.PBIZ_CD FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS PBIZ_CD , NVL((SELECT Z.UBIZ_RANK FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS UBIZ_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.UBIZ_CD FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS UBIZ_CD , NVL((SELECT Z.DBIZ_RANK FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS DBIZ_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.DBIZ_NM FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS DBIZ_NM , NVL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_DGRCOMPO Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.UP_TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND A.COMPO_LEVEL != 1), 0) AS CHILD_CNT , NVL((SELECT Z.SYMBOL FROM TB_DGRCOMPOSYMBOL Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.COMPO_LEVEL = A.COMPO_LEVEL AND SYMBOL_LENGTH > 0), '') AS LAVEL_SYMBOL , NVL((SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(ZZ.FRSC SEPARATOR '
') FROM (SELECT DECODE(SUBSTR(MAX(Z2.FRSC_FG_NM), 0, 1), '자', '시', SUBSTR(MAX(Z2.FRSC_FG_NM), 0, 1)) || ':' || TRIM(TO_CHAR(CAST(((NVL(SUM(Z1.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT), 0) + NVL(SUM(Z1.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT), 0))/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)), '999,999,999,999,999,999,999')) AS FRSC , NVL(SUM(Z1.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT), 0) + NVL(SUM(Z1.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT), 0) AS FRSC_AMT FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC Z1 , TB_YEARFRSC Z2 WHERE 1 = 1 AND Z2.FIS_YEAR = Z1.FIS_YEAR AND Z2.FRSC_FG_CD = Z1.FRSC_FG_CD AND Z1.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z1.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z1.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID GROUP BY Z2.FIS_YEAR , Z2.FRSC_FG_CD ) ZZ WHERE 1 = 1 AND ZZ.FRSC_AMT <> 0 ) , '') AS FRSCES FROM ( SELECT T.* FROM (SELECT DECODE(H.CT, 1, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || '001' || '_' || '0000' || '_' || '0000000' || '_' || '0000000000000000' || '_' || '00000000000' , 2, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || '002' || '_' || B.OFFICE_CD || '_' || '0000000' || '_' || '0000000000000000' || '_' || '00000000000' , 3, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || '003' || '_' || B.OFFICE_CD || '_' || A.DEPT_CD || '_' || '0000000000000000' || '_' || '00000000000' , 4, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || '004' || '_' || B.OFFICE_CD || '_' || A.DEPT_CD || '_' || C.DBIZ_CD || '_' || '00000000000' , 5, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || '00' || 4 + A.COMPO_LEVEL || '_' || B.OFFICE_CD || '_' || A.DEPT_CD || '_' || C.DBIZ_CD || '_' || A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS DGRCOMPO_ID , DECODE(H.CT, 1, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || '000' || '_' || '0000' || '_' || '0000000' || '_' || '0000000000000000' || '_' || '00000000000' , 2, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || '001' || '_' || '0000' || '_' || '0000000' || '_' || '0000000000000000' || '_' || '00000000000' , 3, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || '002' || '_' || B.OFFICE_CD || '_' || '0000000' || '_' || '0000000000000000' || '_' || '00000000000' , 4, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || '003' || '_' || B.OFFICE_CD || '_' || A.DEPT_CD || '_' || '0000000000000000' || '_' || '00000000000' , 5, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || '00' || 3 + A.COMPO_LEVEL || '_' || B.OFFICE_CD || '_' || A.DEPT_CD || '_' || C.DBIZ_CD || '_' || A.UP_TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS UP_DGRCOMPO_ID , DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, 2, 1, 3, 2, 4, 3, 3 + A.COMPO_LEVEL) AS DGR_LEVEL , A.FIS_YEAR AS FIS_YEAR , A.BGT_DGR AS BGT_DGR , E.REPORT_CD AS REPORT_CD , E.REPORT_DETL_CD AS REPORT_DETL_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '00000000000', 2, '00000000000', 3, '00000000000', 4, '00000000000', A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '0000', B.OFFICE_CD) AS OFFICE_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '0000000', 2, '0000000', A.DEPT_CD) AS DEPT_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '0000000000000000', 2, '0000000000000000', 3, '0000000000000000', C.DBIZ_CD) AS DBIZ_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '00000', 2, '00000', 3, '00000', 4, '00000', A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD) AS TE_MNG_MOK_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, 2, 0, 3, 0, 4, 0, A.TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ) AS TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '', 2, '', 3, '', 4, '', A.DEMAND_COMP_FORMULAR) AS DEMAND_COMP_FORMULAR , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.DEMAND_DIFF_AMT, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.DEMAND_DIFF_AMT, 0), 3, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.DEMAND_DIFF_AMT, 0), 4, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.DEMAND_DIFF_AMT, 0), A.DEMAND_DIFF_AMT)) AS DEMAND_DIFF_AMT , DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, 2, 0, 3, 0, 4, 0, A.COMPO_LEVEL) AS COMPO_LEVEL , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '', 2, '', 3, '', 4, '', A.COMP_GROUND) AS COMP_GROUND , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '', 2, '', 3, '', 4, '', A.COMP_FORMULAR) AS COMP_FORMULAR , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.DIFF_AMT, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.DIFF_AMT, 0), 3, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.DIFF_AMT, 0), 4, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.DIFF_AMT, 0), A.DIFF_AMT)) AS DIFF_AMT , DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, 2, 0, 3, 0, 4, 0, A.SORT_SEQ) AS SORT_SEQ , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '', 2, '', 3, '', 4, '', A.PRE_COMP_FORMULAR) AS PRE_COMP_FORMULAR , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_BGT_AMT, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_BGT_AMT, 0), 3, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_BGT_AMT, 0), 4, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_BGT_AMT, 0), A.PRE_BGT_AMT)) AS PRE_BGT_AMT , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '', 2, '', 3, '', 4, '', A.PRE_FORMULAR) AS PRE_FORMULAR , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_AMT, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_AMT, 0), 3, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_AMT, 0), 4, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_AMT, 0), A.PRE_AMT)) AS PRE_AMT , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '', 2, '', 3, '', 4, '', E.REFLECT_FG) AS REFLECT_FG , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '', 2, '', 3, '', 4, '', E.DEMAND_CONT) AS DEMAND_CONT , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '', 2, '', 3, '', 4, '', E.EXAM_CONT) AS EXAM_CONT , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '', 2, '', 3, '', 4, '', E.SRCH_VAL) AS SRCH_VAL FROM TB_DGRCOMPO A , TB_DGRDEPT B , TB_DGRBIZ C , TB_YEARFISFG D , TB_REPORT090 E , (SELECT ROWNUM AS CT FROM TB_COMMCD WHERE ROWNUM BETWEEN 1 AND 5) H WHERE 1 = 1 AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_USERDEPT Z WHERE Z.USER_ID = #userId# AND Z.DEPT_CD = B.DEPT_CD AND Z.USE_YN = 'Y' AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AND D.FIS_YEAR = C.FIS_YEAR AND D.FIS_FG_CD = C.FIS_FG_CD AND C.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND C.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND C.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND B.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND B.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND B.DEPT_CD = A.DEPT_CD AND A.FIS_YEAR = E.FIS_YEAR AND A.BGT_DGR = E.BGT_DGR AND A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = E.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND (A.CNG_TYPE IS NULL OR A.CNG_TYPE = 'CH02' OR (A.CNG_TYPE = 'CH01' AND A.GRP_LVL != '2')) AND A.COMPO_LEVEL = '1' AND E.REPORT_CD = #reportCd# AND E.REPORT_DETL_CD = #reportDetlCd# AND E.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND E.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND D.FIS_FG_MST_CD = #fisFgMstCd# AND D.FIS_FG_CD = #fisFgCd# AND E.SRCH_VAL LIKE '%' || #srchVal# || '%' AND B.OFFICE_CD = #officeCd# AND B.DEPT_RANK >= #deptRankFr# AND B.DEPT_RANK <= #deptRankTo# AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC Z WHERE 1 = 1 AND Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND Z.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT <> 0 AND Z.FRSC_FG_CD >= #frscFgCdFr# AND Z.FRSC_FG_CD <= #frscFgCdTo# ) GROUP BY DECODE(H.CT, 1, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || '0000' || '_' || '0000000' || '_' || '0000000000000000' || '_' || '00000000000' , 2, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || B.OFFICE_CD || '_' || '0000000' || '_' || '0000000000000000' || '_' || '00000000000' , 3, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || B.OFFICE_CD || '_' || A.DEPT_CD || '_' || '0000000000000000' || '_' || '00000000000' , 4, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || B.OFFICE_CD || '_' || A.DEPT_CD || '_' || C.DBIZ_CD || '_' || '00000000000' , 5, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || B.OFFICE_CD || '_' || A.DEPT_CD || '_' || C.DBIZ_CD || '_' || A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) ) T ) A LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_REPORT B ON B.REPORT_CD = A.REPORT_CD AND B.REPORT_DETL_CD = A.REPORT_DETL_CD AND B.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND B.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND B.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID ) T WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY T.FIS_YEAR , NVL(T.BGT_DGR, 0) , NVL(T.OFFICE_RANK, 0) , NVL(T.OFFICE_CD, '0000') , NVL(T.DEPT_RANK, 0) , NVL(T.DEPT_CD, '0000000') , NVL(T.PBIZ_RANK, 0) , NVL(T.PBIZ_CD, '0000000000000000') , NVL(T.UBIZ_RANK, 0) , NVL(T.UBIZ_CD, '0000000000000000') , NVL(T.DBIZ_RANK, 0) , NVL(T.DBIZ_CD, '0000000000000000') , NVL(T.TE_MNG_MOK_CD, '00000') , NVL(T.SORT_SEQ, 0)

/*ReportWrite090.selectReport090ExcelList*/ SELECT T.DGRCOMPO_ID AS DGRCOMPO_ID , T.UP_DGRCOMPO_ID AS UP_DGRCOMPO_ID , CAST(T.DGR_LEVEL AS NUMERIC(5, 0)) AS DGR_LEVEL , T.REPORT_DETL_CD AS REPORT_DETL_CD , TRIM(CASE WHEN T.DGR_LEVEL = 0 THEN '합계' WHEN T.DGR_LEVEL = 1 THEN T.OFFICE_NM WHEN T.DGR_LEVEL = 2 THEN T.DEPT_NM WHEN T.DGR_LEVEL = 3 THEN T.DBIZ_NM WHEN T.DGR_LEVEL > 3 THEN LAVEL_SYMBOL || T.COMP_GROUND ELSE '' END) AS DGRCOMPO_NM , NVL(T.DEMAND_COMP_FORMULAR, '') AS DEMAND_COMP_FORMULAR , CAST((T.DEMAND_DIFF_AMT/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS DEMAND_BGT_AMT , NVL(T.COMP_FORMULAR, '') AS COMP_FORMULAR , CAST((T.DIFF_AMT/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS BGT_AMT , NVL(T.PRE_COMP_FORMULAR, '') AS PRE_COMP_FORMULAR , CAST((T.PRE_BGT_AMT/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_BGT_AMT , NVL(T.PRE_FORMULAR, '') AS PRE_FORMULAR , CAST((T.PRE_AMT/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_AMT , CAST(((T.DIFF_AMT - T.PRE_BGT_AMT)/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS DIFF_AMT , T.REFLECT_FG_NM AS REFLECT_FG_NM , T.DEMAND_CONT AS DEMAND_CONT , T.EXAM_CONT AS EXAM_CONT , T.DEPT_CD AS DEPT_CD , DECODE(T.DGR_LEVEL, 4, T.SRCH_VAL, '') AS SRCH_VAL FROM (SELECT A.DGRCOMPO_ID AS DGRCOMPO_ID , A.UP_DGRCOMPO_ID AS UP_DGRCOMPO_ID , A.DGR_LEVEL AS DGR_LEVEL , A.FIS_YEAR AS FIS_YEAR , A.BGT_DGR AS BGT_DGR , A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AS TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , A.REPORT_CD AS REPORT_CD , A.REPORT_DETL_CD AS REPORT_DETL_CD , A.OFFICE_CD AS OFFICE_CD , A.DEPT_CD AS DEPT_CD , A.DBIZ_CD AS DBIZ_CD , A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD AS TE_MNG_MOK_CD , A.TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ AS TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , A.DEMAND_COMP_FORMULAR AS DEMAND_COMP_FORMULAR , A.DEMAND_DIFF_AMT AS DEMAND_DIFF_AMT , A.COMPO_LEVEL AS COMPO_LEVEL , A.COMP_GROUND AS COMP_GROUND , A.COMP_FORMULAR AS COMP_FORMULAR , A.DIFF_AMT AS DIFF_AMT , A.SORT_SEQ AS SORT_SEQ , A.PRE_COMP_FORMULAR AS PRE_COMP_FORMULAR , A.PRE_BGT_AMT AS PRE_BGT_AMT , A.PRE_FORMULAR AS PRE_FORMULAR , A.PRE_AMT AS PRE_AMT , A.REFLECT_FG AS REFLECT_FG , A.DEMAND_CONT AS DEMAND_CONT , A.EXAM_CONT AS EXAM_CONT , A.SRCH_VAL AS SRCH_VAL , NVL((SELECT Z.DETL_CD_NM FROM TB_COMMCDDETL Z WHERE Z.CL_CD = 'RP003' AND Z.DETL_CD = A.REFLECT_FG AND ROWNUM = 1), '') AS REFLECT_FG_NM , NVL((SELECT Z.OFFICE_RANK FROM TB_DGRDEPT Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.OFFICE_CD = A.OFFICE_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS OFFICE_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.OFFICE_NM FROM TB_DGRDEPT Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.OFFICE_CD = A.OFFICE_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), '') AS OFFICE_NM , NVL((SELECT Z.DEPT_RANK FROM TB_DGRDEPT Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DEPT_CD = A.DEPT_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS DEPT_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.DEPT_NM FROM TB_DGRDEPT Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DEPT_CD = A.DEPT_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), '') AS DEPT_NM , NVL((SELECT Z.PBIZ_RANK FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS PBIZ_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.PBIZ_CD FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS PBIZ_CD , NVL((SELECT Z.UBIZ_RANK FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS UBIZ_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.UBIZ_CD FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS UBIZ_CD , NVL((SELECT Z.DBIZ_RANK FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS DBIZ_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.DBIZ_NM FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS DBIZ_NM , NVL((SELECT Z.SYMBOL FROM TB_DGRCOMPOSYMBOL Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.COMPO_LEVEL = A.COMPO_LEVEL AND SYMBOL_LENGTH > 0), '') AS LAVEL_SYMBOL FROM ( SELECT T.* FROM (SELECT DECODE(H.CT, 1, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || E.REPORT_DETL_CD || '_' || '0000' || '_' || '0000000' || '_' || '0000000000000000' || '_' || '00000000000' , 2, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || E.REPORT_DETL_CD || '_' || B.OFFICE_CD || '_' || '0000000' || '_' || '0000000000000000' || '_' || '00000000000' , 3, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || E.REPORT_DETL_CD || '_' || B.OFFICE_CD || '_' || A.DEPT_CD || '_' || '0000000000000000' || '_' || '00000000000' , 4, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || E.REPORT_DETL_CD || '_' || B.OFFICE_CD || '_' || A.DEPT_CD || '_' || C.DBIZ_CD || '_' || '00000000000' , 5, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || E.REPORT_DETL_CD || '_' || B.OFFICE_CD || '_' || A.DEPT_CD || '_' || C.DBIZ_CD || '_' || A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS DGRCOMPO_ID , DECODE(H.CT, 1, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || '000' || '_' || '0000' || '_' || '0000000' || '_' || '0000000000000000' || '_' || '00000000000' , 2, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || E.REPORT_DETL_CD || '_' || '0000' || '_' || '0000000' || '_' || '0000000000000000' || '_' || '00000000000' , 3, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || E.REPORT_DETL_CD || '_' || B.OFFICE_CD || '_' || '0000000' || '_' || '0000000000000000' || '_' || '00000000000' , 4, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || E.REPORT_DETL_CD || '_' || B.OFFICE_CD || '_' || A.DEPT_CD || '_' || '0000000000000000' || '_' || '00000000000' , 5, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || E.REPORT_DETL_CD || '_' || B.OFFICE_CD || '_' || A.DEPT_CD || '_' || C.DBIZ_CD || '_' || A.UP_TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS UP_DGRCOMPO_ID , DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, 2, 1, 3, 2, 4, 3, 3 + A.COMPO_LEVEL) AS DGR_LEVEL , A.FIS_YEAR AS FIS_YEAR , A.BGT_DGR AS BGT_DGR , E.REPORT_CD AS REPORT_CD , E.REPORT_DETL_CD AS REPORT_DETL_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '00000000000', 2, '00000000000', 3, '00000000000', 4, '00000000000', A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '0000', B.OFFICE_CD) AS OFFICE_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '0000000', 2, '0000000', A.DEPT_CD) AS DEPT_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '0000000000000000', 2, '0000000000000000', 3, '0000000000000000', C.DBIZ_CD) AS DBIZ_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '00000', 2, '00000', 3, '00000', 4, '00000', A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD) AS TE_MNG_MOK_CD , DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, 2, 0, 3, 0, 4, 0, A.TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ) AS TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '', 2, '', 3, '', 4, '', A.DEMAND_COMP_FORMULAR) AS DEMAND_COMP_FORMULAR , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.DEMAND_DIFF_AMT, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.DEMAND_DIFF_AMT, 0), 3, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.DEMAND_DIFF_AMT, 0), 4, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.DEMAND_DIFF_AMT, 0), A.DEMAND_DIFF_AMT)) AS DEMAND_DIFF_AMT , DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, 2, 0, 3, 0, 4, 0, A.COMPO_LEVEL) AS COMPO_LEVEL , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '', 2, '', 3, '', 4, '', A.COMP_GROUND) AS COMP_GROUND , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '', 2, '', 3, '', 4, '', A.COMP_FORMULAR) AS COMP_FORMULAR , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.DIFF_AMT, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.DIFF_AMT, 0), 3, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.DIFF_AMT, 0), 4, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.DIFF_AMT, 0), A.DIFF_AMT)) AS DIFF_AMT , DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, 2, 0, 3, 0, 4, 0, A.SORT_SEQ) AS SORT_SEQ , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '', 2, '', 3, '', 4, '', A.PRE_COMP_FORMULAR) AS PRE_COMP_FORMULAR , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_BGT_AMT, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_BGT_AMT, 0), 3, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_BGT_AMT, 0), 4, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_BGT_AMT, 0), A.PRE_BGT_AMT)) AS PRE_BGT_AMT , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '', 2, '', 3, '', 4, '', A.PRE_FORMULAR) AS PRE_FORMULAR , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_AMT, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_AMT, 0), 3, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_AMT, 0), 4, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.PRE_AMT, 0), A.PRE_AMT)) AS PRE_AMT , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '', 2, '', 3, '', 4, '', E.REFLECT_FG) AS REFLECT_FG , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '', 2, '', 3, '', 4, '', E.DEMAND_CONT) AS DEMAND_CONT , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '', 2, '', 3, '', 4, '', E.EXAM_CONT) AS EXAM_CONT , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '', 2, '', 3, '', 4, '', E.SRCH_VAL) AS SRCH_VAL FROM TB_DGRCOMPO A , TB_DGRDEPT B , TB_DGRBIZ C , TB_YEARFISFG D , TB_REPORT090 E , (SELECT ROWNUM AS CT FROM TB_COMMCD WHERE ROWNUM BETWEEN 1 AND 5) H WHERE 1 = 1
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_USERDEPT Z WHERE Z.USER_ID = #userId# AND Z.DEPT_CD = B.DEPT_CD AND Z.USE_YN = 'Y' AND ROWNUM = 1 )
AND D.FIS_YEAR = C.FIS_YEAR AND D.FIS_FG_CD = C.FIS_FG_CD AND C.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND C.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND C.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND B.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND B.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND B.DEPT_CD = A.DEPT_CD AND A.FIS_YEAR = E.FIS_YEAR AND A.BGT_DGR = E.BGT_DGR AND A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = E.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND E.REPORT_CD = #reportCd#
AND E.REPORT_DETL_CD = #reportDetlCd#
AND E.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND E.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND A.COMPO_LEVEL = '1' AND (A.CNG_TYPE IS NULL OR A.CNG_TYPE = 'CH02' OR (A.CNG_TYPE = 'CH01' AND A.GRP_LVL != '2'))
AND D.FIS_FG_MST_CD = #fisFgMstCd#
AND D.FIS_FG_CD = #fisFgCd#
AND E.SRCH_VAL LIKE '%' || #srchVal# || '%'
AND B.OFFICE_CD = #officeCd#
AND B.DEPT_RANK >= #deptRankFr#
AND B.DEPT_RANK <= #deptRankTo#
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC Z WHERE 1 = 1 AND Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND Z.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT <> 0
AND Z.FRSC_FG_CD >= #frscFgCdFr#
AND Z.FRSC_FG_CD <= #frscFgCdTo#
)
GROUP BY DECODE(H.CT, 1, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || E.REPORT_DETL_CD || '_' || '0000' || '_' || '0000000' || '_' || '0000000000000000' || '_' || '00000000000' , 2, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || E.REPORT_DETL_CD || '_' || B.OFFICE_CD || '_' || '0000000' || '_' || '0000000000000000' || '_' || '00000000000' , 3, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || E.REPORT_DETL_CD || '_' || B.OFFICE_CD || '_' || A.DEPT_CD || '_' || '0000000000000000' || '_' || '00000000000' , 4, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || E.REPORT_DETL_CD || '_' || B.OFFICE_CD || '_' || A.DEPT_CD || '_' || C.DBIZ_CD || '_' || '00000000000' , 5, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || E.REPORT_DETL_CD || '_' || B.OFFICE_CD || '_' || A.DEPT_CD || '_' || C.DBIZ_CD || '_' || A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) ) T ) A ) T WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY T.FIS_YEAR , NVL(T.BGT_DGR, 0) , NVL(T.OFFICE_RANK, 0) , NVL(T.OFFICE_CD, '0000') , NVL(T.DEPT_RANK, 0) , NVL(T.DEPT_CD, '0000000') , NVL(T.PBIZ_RANK, 0) , NVL(T.PBIZ_CD, '0000000000000000') , NVL(T.UBIZ_RANK, 0) , NVL(T.UBIZ_CD, '0000000000000000') , NVL(T.DBIZ_RANK, 0) , NVL(T.DBIZ_CD, '0000000000000000') , NVL(T.TE_MNG_MOK_CD, '00000') , NVL(T.SORT_SEQ, 0)
sqlMap.update: /*ReportWrite090.updateReport090*/ UPDATE TB_REPORT090 SET REFLECT_FG = #reflectFg# , DEMAND_CONT = #demandCont# , EXAM_CONT = #examCont# , MODI_ID = #userId# , MODI_DATE = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE 1 = 1 AND REPORT_CD = #reportCd# AND REPORT_DETL_CD = #reportDetlCd# AND FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = #teBgtCompoId#
